calendar.matters:
Petition To Confirm Court Jurisdiction Under Ccp 664.6 Over Settlement
Off Calendar Dec-09-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ernest Der for Lena Nagata and Walter Low. John Mounier for Robin Low.

Mr. Der stated that he contemplated that they will be dismissing the probate action. The Court granted Petition to Confirm Jurisdiction Under CCP 664.6 Over Settlement (subject to review of the order). The Court will revise language in the order.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Sep-18-2014 Vacated

Ex Parte Application For Order Confirming Robyn Low As Agent To Make Health Care Decisions For Yin Kuon Low Under The April 7, 2005 Advance Health Care Directive
Off Calendar Jun-17-2014 Denied

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Request For Production Of Documents And For Sanctions
Off Calendar May-30-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ernest Der for Lena Nagata and Walter Low (Moving Party). John Mounier for Robyn Low (Respondent).

Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions with verification, waived objections, including attorney-cleint privilege and work product protection, the lack of response to discovery and disclosure of experts. The Court stated its rulings and instructed Mr. Der to submit an order and send it to Mr. Mounier for approval as to form. The matter is deem submitted when the order is received.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. Not Reported.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Request For Production Of Documents And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Mar-26-2014 Continued To Apr-24-14 At 02:30 P.M. In Dept 204

PETITION For Approval Of Actions By Attorneys-In-Fact
Off Calendar Mar-03-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ernest Der for Lena Nagata. John Mounier for Robyn Low.

Counsel explained that they were unable to agree on/select a pro bono mediator. The Court did not entertain Mr. Mounier's request to order the Parties to mediation. The Petition for Approval of Actions by Attorneys-in-Fact was referred to the department of the Presiding Judge (206) to be set for trial, (order for the same signed in open court).

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Probate Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)

PETITION For Approval Of Actions By Attorneys-In-Fact
Off Calendar Dec-02-2013 Continued To Mar-03-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ernest Der for Lena Nagata and Walter Low. John Mounier for Robyn Low (Objector).

Mr. Der requested a 90-day continuance to complete discovery. Mr. Mounier stated that he has conducted discovery, that he has proposed several nominations for a Mediator and that 90-days seems appropriate. The Petition for Approval of Actions by Attorney-In-Fact was continued to March 3, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Lillian K. Sing. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)

PETITION For Approval Of Actions By Attorneys-In-Fact
Off Calendar Oct-28-2013 Continued To Dec-02-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ernest Der for Lena Nagata (Petitioner).

Mr. Der stated that Mr. Mounier just completed deposition of his Client, that Mr. Mounier selected a Mediator outside of the Pro Bono panel, that he secured four possible dates, that Mr. Mounier has now suggested someone else, that he refused this other Mediator and that he has not received a response from Mr. Mounier. Mr. Der also suggested one more continuance and stated that if there is no appearance, that the matter will go to trial. Mr. Der also stated that this is a difficult family dynamic and that no matter what happens, the matter should go to mediation. The Petition for Approval of Actions by Attorneys-In-Fact was continued to December 2, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy W. Clark. (Not Reported)

PETITION For Approval Of Actions By Attorneys-In-Fact
Off Calendar Sep-23-2013 Continued To Oct-28-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION For Approval Of Actions By Attorneys-In-Fact
Off Calendar Jul-10-2013 Continued To Sep-23-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Stay Depositions And Production Of Documents And Quash R. Low'S Notice Of Depositions By Oral Examination.
Off Calendar Jul-10-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ernest Der for Lena Nagata and Walter Low. John Mounier for Robyn Low.

Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions with regard to sanctions. Petitioners, Lena Nagata and Walter Low's Motion to Stay Depositions and Production of Documents and Quash Robyn Low's Notice of Depositions by Oral Examination is hereby GRANTED, in part, as follows: 1) Deposition of Dr. Lee-Tat Chan, MD is hereby STAYED for 30 days. Respondent Robyn Low is granted leave to amend her Deposition Notice to Dr. Chan to limit deposition testimony use to only "[a]t the trial or any other hearing in the action" pursuant to CCP 2025.620. The law does not allow for the use of desposition testimoney for "all purposes." All other grounds for staying Dr. Chan's deposition are hereby overruled.
2) Notices of Deposition for Petitioners/Party Deponents, Lena Negata and Walter Low is hereby QUASHED, without prejudice, for (1) failure to timely serve the Notices of Consumer on consumer, Yin Kuon Low, and (2) improper inclusion of intended use of deposition testimony. Pursuant to CCP 2025.620, deposition testimony may be used only "[a]t the trial or any other hearing in the action" and does not extend to "all purposes." All other grounds for staying or quashing to the Notices of Deposition to Petitioners are hereby overruled. 3) Sanctions pursuant to stipulation shall be AWARDED, in an amount of $1,500.00. Mr. Der is to prepare a form of order. The hearing date of July 22, 2013 on the Petition for Approval of Actions by Attorneys-In-Fact was continued to September 23, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status on mediation.

Judge: Lillian K. Sing. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Henry. (Not Reported)

PETITION For Approval Of Actions By Attorneys-In-Fact
Off Calendar May-20-2013 Continued To Jul-22-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ernest Der for and with Lena Nagata and Walter Low. John Mounier for and with Robyn Low.

The Counsel spoke of circumstances, family dynamics and stated that they are in the process of discovery. The Parties agreed to participate in mediation. The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than July 22, 2013. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by July 17, 2013. The Petition for Approval of actions by Attorneys-In-Fact was continued to and the Parties are to return on July 22, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status on mediation.

Judge: Lynn O'Malley Taylor. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton.
